quoteLast: by the Boers celebrating their independence.
title: Mafeking
author: Baillie, Frederick David, 1862-

quoteFirst: "Now, gentlemen," and he glanced at his watch, "it's
quoteLast: o'clock. At three that mine will explode. We will all be in the room when it happens, unless his Highness sees fit to destroy the compact."
title: Elusive Isabel
author: Futrelle, Jacques, 1875-1912; Kimball, Alonzo, 1874-1923 [Illustrator]
